summary: Completed testing of 1688 Auto-Link feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Order Fulfillment Modal shows auto-linked 1688 products with 'Auto-detected' badge, product ID, View button, and 'Order on 1688' button.

issues: Product image not shown for auto-detected products that haven't been imported yet - this is expected behavior since product details are only available after import

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/1688-scraper/product-links/get-1688 correctly extracts 1688 product ID from SKU using regex pattern (\d{12,})
POST /api/1688-scraper/product-links/bulk-auto-link successfully links multiple SKUs and creates entries in product_links collection
GET /api/1688-scraper/orders/with-linkable-products returns orders with line items showing link status and extracted 1688 IDs
Frontend OrderFulfillmentModal.jsx correctly fetches and displays auto-linked products with 'Auto-detected' badge
seed_data_creation: Test order #99001 exists with SKUs: 1688-850596274690-BLACK-42, 1688-649752139926-WHITE-XL. Both products are linked in product_links collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-link feature fully tested. Test order #99001 has 2 line items with 1688 product IDs in SKUs. Products 850596274690 and 649752139926 exist in scraped_products collection and are linked. Order #29533 has SKU 715816597116-black-41 which auto-detects product ID but product needs import (no image/title/price shown). All backend APIs working: GET /api/1688-scraper/product-links/get-1688, POST /api/1688-scraper/product-links/bulk-auto-link, GET /api/1688-scraper/orders/with-linkable-products.

features_tested.1_get_1688_link_api: PASS - GET /api/1688-scraper/product-links/get-1688 returns linked or suggested link based on SKU
features_tested.2_bulk_auto_link_api: PASS - POST /api/1688-scraper/product-links/bulk-auto-link links multiple SKUs successfully
features_tested.3_orders_with_linkable_products_api: PASS - GET /api/1688-scraper/orders/with-linkable-products returns orders with link status
features_tested.5_fulfillment_modal_shows_auto_linked: PASS - Modal shows '1688 Linked Product' with 'Auto-detected' badge
features_tested.6_order_on_1688_button: PASS - 'Order on 1688' button appears for linkable products

api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688-scraper/product-links/get-: WORKING - Returns linked product or suggested link from SKU extraction
api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688-scraper/orders/with-linkab: WORKING - Returns orders with linkable_count and linked_count
